title: AIOS Mission Control

security.note: Mission Control chỉ dùng nội bộ cho 1 mình anh Cường xem trên local dashboard.

yesterday_report.summary: Ship xong memory stack langchain-first + kiểm soát chất lượng + release/doc đầy đủ.
completed: Ship langchain-first memory backend với fallback local (config + runtime).
Fix reliability: sửa import lỗi, thêm backend-handle cache để tránh warmup lặp.
Migrate embeddings import theo hướng langchain-huggingface (có backward fallback).
Nâng doctor: thêm memory_backend + memory_rw probe thực tế.
Thêm optional dependency group .[memory] trong pyproject.
Thêm CI job memory-profile (install .[memory] + test + doctor).
Update README: CI badge, CI profiles, memory setup hướng dẫn rõ ràng.

items.task: Integrate rubric into daily feedback loop
RAG cheatsheet application to AIOS retrieval pipeline
RAG pipeline v1 document and rollout
Link Mission Control từ dashboard chính
Expose Mission Control link from dashboard

next_focus: Endpoint /api/memory/health + card hiển thị trên dashboard.
Tích hợp rubric hành vi vào loop feedback hằng ngày.

notes.text: Mission Control đã được nạp đầy đủ công việc hôm qua; dùng làm bảng báo cáo nội bộ cho sếp.
Added reference: RAG cheatsheet PDF from DrResh GitHub into learning inbox.
Mission Control refreshed with latest progress (memory benchmark guard, mission dashboard, behavior training pack, current in-progress tasks).
New task: research and apply ideas from DrResh RAG cheatsheet to AIOS memory/retrieval pipeline.
Applied RAG-for-Su checklist into BEHAVIOR_SPEC_v1 for daily response behavior.
Status ping: Team is implementing metadata-aware memory search (in progress). No new DONE milestone yet; next report on first merged milestone.
Timezone display switched to Asia/Bangkok for Mission Control readability.
Added docs/RAG_PIPELINE_v1.md and set RAG v1 rollout plan for Su/team.
Implemented Obsidian second-brain local index/search + references shortlist.
Snake growth logic updated: now uses mission progress XP (events + commits + notes + learning + chat examples).
UI update: added quick back link from Mission Control to main AIOS Dashboard for easier switching.
Mission Control upgraded: Kanban status controls, blockers panel, KPI cards, and one-click daily report.
Reliability upgrade: Mission Control now auto-creates backup and auto-restores from backup if main file is missing/corrupt.
UX reliability: Mission Control now injects cache-busting version for JS to avoid stale cached UI.
Fixed Mission Control loading issue on mobile: repaired JS blocker rendering syntax and restarted dashboard.
Implemented context-memory scaffolding: user/agent/org memory files, read-only policies, and reusable procedural skills templates.
Applied continual-learning guidance: added followup_after_training skill and 7-day blueprint doc.
Milestone done: integrated rubric loop with API /api/conversation/rubric-review and rubric scoring tests.
Milestone done: metadata-aware memory search now supports filters kind/role/source in API and backend.
Milestone done: applied RAG retrieval strategy with auto intent-based metadata filters for memory search.
Program naming approved: Training Camp cho Su v1.
Milestones done: added /api/memory/health and memory health card on dashboard.
Kickoff new phase: Harness Learning with trace schema + failure-mode dashboard.
Started new project: Story Audio Reader web app (browser TTS), committed and pushed.
Integrated Story Audio Reader into AIOS dashboard as a tab link at /story-reader and enabled LAN access via main dashboard port.
Story Audio Reader upgraded with OCR-from-image (tesseract.js), so app can read text extracted from image files.
